description: A one-paragraph description of what data this connector syncs and what customers use it for.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your API key. Found in your account settings under API Access.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: The base URL for your API instance.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Region
fields.description: The region where your data is hosted.

fields.name: enable_incremental
fields.label: Enable Incremental Sync
fields.description: When enabled, only syncs records changed since the last sync.
